summary: CRITICAL ISSUE: Test file 'VersionBumper.Tests.ps1' referenced in workflow line 27 does not exist; workflow will fail immediately. Task requires TDD with Pester tests and mock fixtures—none provided. PowerShell patterns mostly sound (StrictMode, ErrorActionPreference, type hints) but `bump-version.ps1` lacks Set-StrictMode. Code duplication: header parsing repeated in Get-BumpLevel (~57), New-ChangelogEntry (~113), Get-CommitSubject (~104)—should factor into Parse-CommitHeader helper. Workflow assumes VERSION/commits.txt exist with no guards. Output parsing (line `split '='`) is fragile. No evidence of actionlint validation or `act` testing (both required). Invoke-VersionBump conflates concerns; New-ChangelogEntry mixes parsing+rendering. Deliverable incomplete without test fixtures.
